title: Lulu and the Moonhush
cover_prompt: A small, round creature with soft lavender fur and wide, curious eyes curled in a nest of silver moss under a glowing crescent moon. Fireflies drift like tiny stars around her, and the forest breathes in quiet blue-green hues.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm ooh laa lu
Shaa noo tss haa
Pff eeh na na
Mmm ooh laa

[verse]
Haa lu lu shh
Ooh naa pff mmm
Tss laa ooh eeh
Mmm haa lu

[verse]
Mmm shh noo noo
Pff laa lu mmm
Ooh haa tss shh
Mmm...

---
style_prompt: Gentle folk lullaby, warm female vocal, fingerpicked acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, pastoral, settling, peaceful, evening atmosphere, descending melody phrases, each verse quieter, conversational singing, the world going to sleep, fingerpicked acoustic guitar accompaniment

character.name: Lulu
character.identity: A tiny night-dwelling creature who hums the world to sleep with her soft, curious sounds.
character.special: Her voice mirrors the quiet rhythms of the forest, turning every rustle and sigh into a lullaby.

about: A gentle, descending lullaby where the world settles into stillness one soft sound at a time. The mirrored rhythms of nature—breath, breeze, and moonlight—guide little ones into sleep, offering permission to let go with each quiet note.
